data.title: Foundayo™ (orforglipron), Lilly's new oral GLP-1 pill for weight loss, now available in the U.S.
data.description: Foundayo can now be purchased through LillyDirect® and telehealth services, and is being distributed to retail pharmacies across the country. Known as the sole GLP-1 pill for weight loss, it can be consumed at any time of day without the need for food or water restrictions. The starting price for Foundayo is $25 monthly with commercial insurance coverage, and $149 for those without insurance.

data.title: Is A Market Turn Coming? Kobeissi Letter Spots Ominous Drop In Billionaire-Favored Stocks
data.description: A market observer, The Kobeissi Letter, has highlighted a discrepancy in stock markets where companies heavily favored by U.S. billionaires are performing worse compared to the broader S&P 500 index. This phenomenon, according to The Kobeissi Letter, has historically indicated a forthcoming upswing in market performance. The analysis revealed that the ratio between the Bloomberg U.S. Billionaires Investment Index and the S&P 500 has dropped to 0.41, marking its lowest point since April 2025. The Bloomberg U.S. Billionaires Investment Index monitors the top 50 U.S.-listed stocks preferred by American billionaires. The underperformance of the wealthiest Americans' stock portfolios is evident in the declining ratio, as highlighted by The Kobeissi Letter. This observation was shared on Twitter by The Kobeissi Letter account on April 8, 2026. The commentator pointed out that the decreasing ratio signifies... More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jacobs Secures Contracts to Improve Travel on Chicago’s I-290 Corridor
data.description: Jacobs, a leading company in infrastructure improvements, has been selected to enhance travel on the I-290 Corridor in Chicago. This project aims to bolster resilience and safety on this crucial part of the US multimodal network. The upgrades are expected to significantly improve transportation conditions for commuters and travelers.

data.title: Everything Blockchain (OTC: EBZT) Acquires 10% Stake in NoLimit Foundation
data.description: Everything Blockchain, Inc. (OTC: EBZT) has revealed its acquisition of a 10% ownership interest in NoLimit Foundation. NoLimit Foundation is engaged in the development of private AI infrastructure.

data.title: Bhutan transfers $23M in Bitcoin; holdings decline by 70% as they move 319 BTC, totaling over 9,000 BTC since late 2024.
data.description: Bhutan recently transferred an additional 319 bitcoins, bringing the total amount moved to over 9,000 bitcoins since late 2024. This move has reduced the country's sovereign cryptocurrency reserve by approximately 70%.

data.title: South Korean court lifts Upbit suspension due to regulatory issues, ending a year-long legal dispute by Dunamu.
data.description: After enduring over a year-long legal dispute, Dunamu has successfully overturned the sanction and halted its enforcement. The company's victory comes after a strenuous battle, marking the end of a prolonged legal process.

data.title: Businesses face sustained pressure in 2026 as global insolvencies rise 3%, Atradius forecasts
data.description: On April 9, 2026, it was reported that Atradius predicts a continued increase in insolvencies for the year, driven by ongoing challenging conditions that are placing pressure on companies and impacting operating margins in various industries. The most recent Atradius Insolvency Outlook indicates that global insolvencies are expected to rise further in 2026.
